programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Ice Spice compares snacks from the UK and the USA! We introduce her to the iconic British classics of Marmite, crumpets, and pickled onions... and it's safe to say she probably won't be trying them again anytime soon. Katy Perry compares some of the UK's most iconic foods to their US counterparts. The singer tries a Brain Licker for the very first time, attempts to stick 16 Maltesers in her mouth in one go, and grosses herself out with spray cheese.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Channing Tatum and Naomi Ackie join us for a great game of Snack Wars: USA v UK! Channing devours some Popeyes, Naomi introduces Channing to classic British booze WKD, and they try each other's favourite childhood candy!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: The Grand Tour's Jeremy Clarkson, Richard Hammond and James May pit British delicacies against food from around the world, necking Japanese sake and devouring British pork pies. They even attempt to eat a Chinese century egg!

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Sinners star Hailee Steinfeld tries British and American treats, finding her new obsession in Hobnobs, calling them an instant favourite. As for Peeps? It's a hard no. Tune in to see which country's snacks reign supreme. Afrobeats megastar Davido joins LADbible's Snack Wars for the ultimate taste test... And things get spicy! Watch as he puts British and Irish snacks head-to-head with Nigerian favourites, and trust us, he doesn't hold back.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: Shaboozey joins us to compare British and American snacks! He falls in love with Maltesers, spits out Milk Duds, explains why the PB&J is the ultimate staple of American cuisine, and finishes it all off with a double shot of whiskey.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: The incredible Nina Aouilk continues her inspiring two-part story, bravely opening up about escaping an ‘honour killing' attempt only to enter an abusive relationship, becoming a mother, breaking the cycle of abuse, and becoming an activist.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Baz Hulse, who was jailed for 10 years in a prison in India for smuggling diazepam tablets, tells us about his life inside prison, the culture shock he experienced and the mental strength he needed to push through.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: Ali Gonzalez, a former Sicario (hitman) for one of Mexico's most notorious cartels, talks us through being groomed into the organisation, the most violent things he witnessed, his stint in prison and his journey to redemption.

programme.title: Minutes With
programme.desc: John Massey, at one point England's longest-serving prisoner, spent an astonishing 43 years behind bars. John candidly shares his life story with us, including the murder that led him to prison, his four daring escapes, and his eventual release.

programme.title: Snack Wars
programme.desc: UFC Star Alexander Volkanovski joins us for Snack Wars: UK v Australia. Former footballers, Real Madrid Galáctico star Roberto Carlos and Arsenal Invincible player Gilberto Silva, try Pimm's for the first time with Caipirinha cocktails, compare British and Brazilian beer and share their love for Frazzles and Torresmos.

programme.title: Class of '92: Full Time

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Beasts of Burden: About twelve thousand years ago, before the Neolithic Revolution, humans were mainly hunter-gatherers. Among the animals we hunted were the wild aurochs, the ancestor of all domestic cattle. The domestication of cows led to the use of oxen as draught animals that could help farmers plough fields.

programme.title: Animals That Changed History
programme.desc: Animals That Changed History - Season 1 - Companionship: Throughout history, humans have surrounded themselves with animals. But there are two species that are our undeniable favourites. Every dog today was once a wolf - genetically speaking. Wolves and hominids met as early as 400,000 years ago. Ancient hunter-gatherers and wolves competed for the same prey, and used the same tracking techniques.

programme.title: Return of the Bible Plagues
programme.desc: Return of the Bible Plagues - Deadly Waters: “... all the waters that were in the river [Nile] were turned to blood. And all the fish that was in the river died,” reports the Bible, “and the river stank, and the Egyptians could not drink of the water of the river.” (Exodus 7:20–21).

programme.title: Deserts On The Move
programme.desc: Deserts On The Move - Europe: Most school textbooks continue to recite the conventional wisdom that Europe does not have any deserts. They are out of date. Portugal, Spain, Italy and Greece are four EU countries that are already so badly affected that they have joined the United Nations Convention to Combat Desertification (CCD).

programme.title: The Biblical Plagues
programme.desc: The Biblical Plagues - Flight from Egypt: Although nine disastrous plagues had already devastated the land along the Nile, Pharaoh remained stubborn and would not release Moses and his people from slavery. And so their God, Yahweh, planned his final assault: At midnight, he sent death over Egypt – all the firstborn, Man or beats, had to die … there was no escape.

programme.title: War Crimes of the Liberators
programme.desc: US soldiers fought for democracy and the freedom of other nations. Yet in the course of military operations, they too committed war crimes. Most of them never followed up on let alone punished. In the wake of the Allies' advance against Hitler's tyranny, there were numerous atrocities committed by the victors, not only in the East. Apart from their medals, some American soldiers also kept a dark secret. GIs killed German Prisoners of War and raped thousands of German women. Estimates of the number of German victims vary widely, and are highly disputed among experts. Not least because they touch on a taboo, since for decades in Germany the subject had been considered as a potential strain on the relation between the Federal Republic of Germany and its Western Allies. According to some historians there were several thousand sexual assaults by American soldiers in Bavaria alone when US forces liberated the region in April 1945. At some invasion beaches in Normandy, only every second germen POW survived. Often, the liberators – shocked by the sight of German atrocities – would fall into a spiral of violence. Very few of these crimes came under investigation by US military courts. Studies by the US War Department hinting at a comparatively high number of transgressions were classified secret.

programme.title: FALLBACK
programme.desc: No information

programme.title: Crime Scene Eulau
programme.desc: This documentary focuses on a spectacular discovery made in a quarry near the village of Eulau, not far from the central German town of Naumburg. Neolithic graves contained the skeletons of three women, two men and eight children, buried tenderly 4500 years ago, some affectionately entwined. In 2008, for the first time anywhere in the world, it was possible to perform a DNA analysis on the earliest evidence of the existence of a nuclear family. This was a sensation - but why did these people all die at the same time? Were they the victims of a violent crime? Who were they, and how did this terrible drama unfold? Archaeologists insist that these victims will not be forgotten, since these days it is possible to do far more than simply date and record such finds. Modern scientific methods have revolutionised archaeology, enabling us to discover how and why the family from Eulau in the German state of Sachsen-Anhalt died 4500 years ago. By enlisting the help of a CID profiler, archaeologists and anthropologists employ state-of-the-art analytical methods to investigate this Stone Age crime. In the process we discover key information about an era before recorded history which has previously been shrouded in mystery - and astonishing information about the composition of the population here also comes to light. It seems that the third millennium before Christ saw two major waves of migration, from Eastern and Western Europe, which determine the composition of the population here. In the middle of what is now Germany these two migratory movements met. Could this be the background to the mysterious murders of Eulau?

programme.title: The DNA Switch
programme.desc: In the non-coding 98% of our DNA, we have countless switches to promote or suppress the physiological reactions of our bodies. We can change the states of these switches.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire's extended animal family and they get to understand how the conservation program works. We get a good understanding of our feature volunteer as she prepares herself for a 3 month stay. What makes her tick and why is she dedicated to helping these wonderful animals? Getting dirty is part of the job as the volunteers tackle the paddock cleaning tasks. One of the highlights in this episode is attempting to catch and relocate a massive python that tried to eat Judy's dog and duiker!

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Rivers Lifeblood
programme.desc: Rivers flow like veins across the Earth, a lifeline to countless ecosystems. Since the dawn of time they've fuelled the development of animal and human life alike. Habitats in constant flux, they change with the seasons, gradually transforming over time. As we run the river's course, we meet the spectacular animals who depend on it. These waterways are as much as lifeblood to this wildlife as they are to us. They deserve our respect and protection – they're our lifeblood and we must keep them flowing.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands
programme.desc: Zanzibar is a land of giants. Isolated from mainland Africa these islands harbour some of the most unique animals with many being the largest found anywhere in the world.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: "Cleaning woman island", concrete castles, Ballermann: Mallorca's image is negatively affected in some respects. The documentary explores the charm of the largest Balearic island beyond the hustle and bustle of tourism and Rambazamba. The "real" Mallorca is best explored through real Majorcans: Manolo Barahona, TV fishing expert from the local island broadcaster IB3, faces the most difficult task of the year. The Raor is in season, the most expensive fish on the island. Manolo is supposed to get him first in front of the camera and then in the pan. There's only one catch, the little fish with the piranha teeth just doesn't want to be on TV. In the first months of the year Mallorca turns into a sea of almond blossoms. There are around seven million almond trees on the island, once planted to replace dead vines. But now also the almond trees are threatened. The fire bacterium continues to spread, especially on the large plantations. The farmer Biel Torrens wants to save Mallorca's almond trees and fruit with a small organic plantation and gentle harvesting methods. He shakes the almonds from the tree by hand instead of using a mechanical vibrator.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The light of the Balearic island of Ibiza is magical and its trademark: The "Island of Light" is tiny compared to its sister island Mallorca, but offers the most beautiful sunsets in the world. That's what they say. They attract sun worshippers and party people from near and far. To the sounds of the famous "Balearic Sound" they turn night into day. This documentary documents the island in the balancing act between luxury yachts and traditions. Hippie culture, celebrities, pine forests, bays with turquoise water and villages with bright white houses: Ibiza has many faces. Mora (80) and Djin (67) have been drawn to the island for 55 years. They are the uncrowned kings of the hippies. But only love, light, air and laziness, these times are also long gone on Ibiza. Mora knits sexy jerseys for young hippies from morning till night. Djin helps her sell at the famous Las Dalias hippie market and works as a construction worker: chilling and no pension in sight. The virgin Carmen is the patron saint of the sailors. On her day of honour, a mass is celebrated in the port city of Eivissa. Afterwards, fishermen carry the Virgin through the narrow streets of Ibiza City down to the quay. And then Carmen sets sail. Several places on Ibiza claim to offer the most beautiful sunset in the world: In front of Cala de Benirrás, the sun sinks right next to the iconic rock Cap Benat, which the locals awefully call "God's Finger". The typical soft beats over the sea sound from almost all the bays and provide deep relaxation worldwide under the term "Balearic Sound". Some of the famous DJs are jetting around the globe for huge fees. But in the small beach bars, the Chiringuitos, the island sound is celebrated further. On the beach of Cala Salada the Brit Joe Burnley has the command over a troop of mermaids. The ladies squeeze into the tight mermaid costume for the good cause. With great grace they swim towards yachts that are forbidden to anchor on sea grass meadows. Charming but unyielding, they point out the offence to the captain and crew a creative environmental action to save the endangered Neptune gas, green lung of the sea and habitat for Ibiza's seahorses. The underwater photographer Manu San Felix is also committed to the endangered seahorses. Using a probe, he maps the coastal area around Ibiza and feeds the data into a GPS app. No skipper should be able to say that he didn't even know that his anchor was clawing into Neptune grass. On land, Manu is dedicated to breeding seahorses. His plan: He wants to expose the animals in the Mediterranean to Ibiza and Formentera in order to secure their population. Garages on the beach? Many bays on the island still have Casetas Varadero, boat garages threatened with decay. Fishermen once built them illegally. The picturesque sheds are therefore only tolerated, but may no longer be restored. The 83-year-old Toni Salvado still drives straight out to sea from his garage. He fishes for his own needs and a few friends, he is

programme.title: Menorca
programme.desc: Not nearly as crowded as Majorca or Ibiza: Menorca has noticeably fewer visitors than her sister islands and in 1993, was recognised by UNESCO as a biosphere re-serve. Menorca also has its own distinctive charm, with its secluded coves, mighty cliffs, beautiful gardens and ages old towns and villages. Its residents love the is-lands treasures and peculiarities. Forests make up al-most a third of Menorca, complemented by many lush green meadows. Next to tourism, agriculture is a major source of the island's income to the present day. On Menorca, there are several accumulations of enormous megalithic stones. From a global point of view, the up to five-metre-tall "Taulas", whereby the stones are ar-ranged in the shape of a "T", are unique.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: The Santorini archipelago is a gem, but is located on a veritable powder keg. It is only a matter of time before the volcano, the crater rim of which gave us this island world, erupts again. Since January 2011, threatening rumblings have been perceived beneath the archipelago. On Santorini, it's a case of getting nowhere fast without a mule. Whether the restaurant terraces above the abyss of Oia, the hotels on the breath-taking cliffs of Imerovigli or Firostefani, it was only with the help of the stubborn climbing artists, that these daring constructions were made possible. Antonis Vlachos has ten strong mules that work for him. He transports almost everything with them: stones, food or the typically blue paint for the church domes. Santorini is a tourist magnet and up to five cruise ships call in at the islands daily. However, there is no port, just a narrow, concrete quay. Without the tender boats, no guests would ever reach the shore.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.sub-title: The Blue and White Island World of Greece: Mykonos, Naxos and Tinos
programme.desc: Around the once sacred Isle of Delos, some 200 islands, including 20 larger ones, are arranged almost in a circle. This is where the name of the Greek island paradise comes from: Cyclades, a derivation of the Greek word kýklos, circle. Each cyclade has a unique character. The pelican Petros, about 20 years old, is the mascot of Mykonos. He moves from taverna to taverna all day long, scrounging fish. This works out sometimes well and sometimes not so well. Petros does have a few human friends who regularly slip him something, but all too often visitors eager to take pictures block his path. Then he has to "wiggle" his way through the crowd. Jackie Onassis is said to have once brought Petros' "great-grandmother" from Louisiana to the island.

programme.title: The Turkish Riviera
programme.sub-title: The flair of antiquity and a turquoise sea
programme.desc: With a coastline boasting miles of bathing beaches, turquoise waters, breath-taking cliffs whilst being steeped in history, the Turkish riviera was even a fa-vourite of the Ancient Greeks, Romans and Ottomans, who all loved the mild climate and the lush landscape. Near the ruins of the ancient city of Side, Menderes Akdemir works on the latest attraction aimed at Riviera holidaymakers: his spooky pirate ship "Big Kral" is due to leave dry dock and head for the sea. Mehmet Özata came up with a very clever idea: to be able to cope with the basically ruinous puffer fish plague along the coastline, he produces a selection of leather utensils made of their skin. The islands that surround the sunk-en city of Simena are hugely popular, despite the very modest infrastructure and lack of shopping facilities. This is why Fatma and Ahmet Mazili have transformed their small rowing boat into a floating snack bar. An-other gap in the market was brought to life by Ufuk Secgin. He came up with the idea of providing Halal Holidays, vacations that conform to Islam. For Muslims to be able to relax on holiday, much has to be well organised, with a copy of the Koran and a prayer rug seen as the absolute minimum requirements

programme.title: A Winter's Tale
programme.sub-title: The Journey of the Snowy Owls
programme.desc: Snowy owls live a life full of mystery up in the Arctic. Thousands of years ago, they built a community of fate with their neighbors – lemmings. About every four years, lemmings proliferate in huge numbers. This way, snowy owls have enough feed for their young. The owls lay up to eleven eggs and can successfully raise the chicks – each of them needs two to four lemmings per day. Lately, however, lemmings' mass reproduction hasn't been as regular in some parts of the Tundra. What will happen to them and the snowy owls? What is the ecological link here? And what will happen if one year the winter arrives way too early? The best way for many birds to adapt to the winter is to flee to the South. But lemmings can't migrate and have to endure temperatures as low as -40°C. Meanwhile, if the winter is too cold and the snow level too high, even the perfectly adapted owls have to migrate in order to survive. A fascinating journey from the Arctic to Central Europe begins. Following the owls on this uncommon path, the viewer learns how animals adapt to the inhospitable climate conditions, what ecological restraints bear down on the northern fauna and which fantastic survival strategies the animals can develop. This unique documentary tells a fascinating and breathtaking story: as in a fairy tale, the snowy owls leave us a message from the changing Arctic.

programme.title: Survival of the Fittest in the Alps
programme.desc: The documentary shows the survival strategies of various animal species in the high mountains of the Alps in winter. Despite freezing temperatures and limited food supply, chamois, red deer and snow hares manage to survive the cold months. Latest research reveals the amazing abilities the animals have developed to adapt to the extreme conditions and also how climate change is altering the behaviour of the alpine inhabitants.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The next two stages take place in Quebec. With eight events over two days, SCL Canada is a true ‘heavyweight'. The athletes compete in: Truck Pull, Deadlift with cars, Log Lift, and the Atlas Stones. The World's Strongest Viking Jean-Francois Caron from Canada is a favourite, as well as current SCL leader Matjaz Belsak (Slovenia) and promising underdog Jimmy Paquet (Canada).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer's Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt'?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven't given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let's see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Fairytale Fantasy
programme.desc: Step into a pastel-tinted dreamworld where sparkles never fade and everything feels like a fairytale!

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'STYLE' MV
programme.desc: Hearts2Hearts' new single ‘STYLE' is an uptempo dance track featuring lively rhythms and groovy bass. The members' bright and bubbly vocals come together to deliver a feel-good energy, capturing Hearts2Hearts' cheerful and lovable charm.

programme.title: XngHan&Xoul 'Heavenly Blue' Intro Video
programme.desc: The upcoming single features “Heavenly Blue”, a refreshing and trendy EDM pop track rooted in Chill House. The song stands out with its soft-textured kick drums, dreamy synth pads, and emotionally charged vocals, delivering a captivating and immersive sound.Seung-han (XngHan) is set to unveil his unique musical identity through his highly anticipated solo debut.

programme.title: XngHan&Xoul 'Waste No Time' MV
programme.desc: The title track, “Waste No Time,” is an electronic dance song that captures XngHan's aspirations as he stands at a new starting point. Characterized by clear and bright synth leads, bass, and a straightforward, addictive melody, the track's lyrics express a youthful resolve to seize the moment and move forward without hesitation.XngHan is making his solo debut under the artist brand XngHan&Xoul, which he launched himself.

programme.title: BoA 'Crazier' Intro
programme.desc: As her first full album in five years, Crazier is sure to be a meaningful treat for fans who've supported her throughout the years.Packed with 11 tracks that range from high-energy dance hits to emotional ballads, including self-written songs, the album showcases her signature versatility. In celebration of her 25th debut anniversary, BoA is set to drop her 11th full-length album 'Crazier' on August 4.

programme.title: BoA 'Crazier' MV
programme.desc: BoA's title track "Crazier," which she personally participated in writing and composing, is a pop punk song that blends an addictive guitar riff with a refreshing vibe. Her signature powerful vocals further enhance the track's completeness. BoA is releasing her 11th full-length album, "Crazier," in celebration of the 25th anniversary of her debut. The lyrics deliver a bold and confident attitude that playfully twists today's world, capturing an energy that's sure to cool down the sweltering summer.

programme.title: aespa 'Dirty Work' MV
programme.desc: “Dirty Work” is a dance track with catchy synth bass and cool vocal melodies, showing off a more Chill and Cool side of their sound. In the music video, the members turn into bold resistance fighters who take on any kind of “dirty work” for each other, highlighting their strong sense of unity. The performance blends fierce, powerful moves with a hint of sensual flair, creating a stage that's full of contrast and energy.

programme.title: Fairytale Fantasy
programme.desc: Step into a pastel-tinted dreamworld where sparkles never fade and everything feels like a fairytale!

programme.title: SUPER JUNIOR 'Express Mode' MV
programme.desc: SUPER JUNIOR delivers the 'ultimate in style' with their title track ‘Express Mode'. Bold lyrics, a danceable sound, and a catchy chorus showcase their cool energy. The performance signals the return of the 'original performance kings.' Charismatic '1 step 2 step 3 step 4' moves and an explosive dance break steal the spotlight. Dynamic formations and expressive gestures bring out each member's unique character.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'BTTF' MV
programme.desc: NCT DREAM embarks on a journey to find their brightest, most confident selves in the title track ‘BTTF (Back To The Future).' Riding a time machine sparks reflection on a meaningful past with no regrets and ignites a renewed drive toward the future. The bold chant “We are the future” captures NCT DREAM's fearless ambition, while the track's signature synth bass and dynamic hip-hop sound — seamlessly traversing past and future — heighten its cinematic sci-fi atmosphere.

programme.title: NCT DREAM 'CHILLER' MV
programme.desc: The lyrics playfully depict the cool and confident 'CHILLER' enjoying their brightest moments, signaling the start of a new chapter for NCT DREAM. Both double title tracks, 'CHILLER' and 'BTTF,' were written by hitmaker KENZIE, creating a seamless narrative connection. Notably, 'CHILLER' serves as both a prequel and sequel to 'BTTF,' offering a deeper experience when listened to together.NCT DREAM's title track 'CHILLER' stands out with its experimental sound rooted in French touch, with standout electronic textures and unpredictable progressions.

programme.title: HYO 'YES' MV
programme.desc: 'YES' is a Sped-Up House track driven by a two-step rhythm and rhythmic bassline. The sophisticated and energetic production is elevated by a bold, captivating topline that enhances the overall vibe of the song.Hyoyeon (HYO) brings refreshing, upbeat energy to beat the summer heat with her new single 'YES.'

programme.title: WayV 威神V 'BIG BANDS (狂想曲)' MV
programme.desc: WayV's title track “BIG BANDS” is an upbeat dance song packed with lively brass, rhythmic beats, and jazzy elements. Its powerful groove and catchy chant vocals leave a strong impression. With lyrics about creating a massive energy that moves the soul, the song captures WayV's confidence and bold vibe. The music video shows the members embracing their unique characters as they “redesign” and transform the world, brought to life with eye-catching visual effects and dynamic performances.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch Sarah and Mark give their sheep a winter-feed. In Teletubbyland, the Teletubbies cannot decide whether to have Tubby Custard or Tubby Toast.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies leave their favourite things to watch some boys spinning some spinning tops to celebrate the Hanukah festival. Tinky Winky wears the skirt on his head to do a very special round and round dance.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies dance a jumping dance before stopping to watch Yvette wash up her plastic cups and saucers. The Teletubbies have a very messy day. So Noo-Noo has to tidy everything up.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies are asleep, but Noo-Noo tidies up their blankets. They stop chasing him to watch some children learn about the number five. A flashing light appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet rises to tell the Teletubbies 'Christmas is a Coming'. They hurry up the slide to see some children decorate a Christmas Tree. The Teletubbies get excited when their own Christmas Tree appears in Teletubbyland.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies watch some children making Christmas cards. Laa-Laa's present is some lovely decorations. When Noo-Noo tidies them up they tickle his throat, so he throws them out to decorate Home Hill.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Andy Brown and some children feed some birds and watch them playing on the bird table. In Teletubbyland, it's timer for Tubby Custard, but Dipsy spills his all over a Tubby Seat.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies love to eat Tubby Custard, but Po spills hers on the floor and the Noo-Noo cleans up the mess. The Teletubbies watch some children ice skating.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The farmyard boys feed their cows and calves and watch them grazing in a field. Tinky Winky, Dipsy and Laa-Laa eat their Tubby Toast at the table, and Po eats her toast in her bed.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Dipsy is out for a walk in his hat. He joins the other Tubbies to watch two girls have their hands painted by their auntie. Po puts her hand in her Tubby Custard.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A group of children sing some Christmas carols to the Teletubbies. Tinky Winky opens his present to find a beautiful star inside. The Teletubbies follow it all over Teletubbyland, but where will is end up?

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: A voice trumpet appears and teaches the Teletubbies a winter nursery rhyme. Po's present is a little frosty cloud that begins to snow. All the Teletubbies laugh as they play in the snow.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies see some children visit a level crossing and watch a train pass by. The Teletubbies play their Ready, Steady, Go game.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When the spies investigate a strange series of attacks, they find that the victims are completely and inexplicably frozen solid.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: A hot new line of cosmetics, called "Moody Beauty", is hitting the shelves at the trendiest boutiques in New York, Paris and Beverly Hills.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: The spies are way psyched when they find out that their favourite new band, The Alpha Centauris, are about to make music history.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: It's the start of a new soccer season at Bev. High and Alex is psyched when her team gets a cool new coach.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: It's the day before the first day of Spring and Sam, Clover and Alex are at the Groove shopping for a new wardrobe when they come across a mystery vendor selling totally cool, totally chic bracelets!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: With no recollection of Jerry, WOOHP, or their super-spy abilities, the girls go about their lives like normal teens - allowing the LAMOS to pursue their latest evil plot.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When people start to mysteriously disappear from a remote rural area, Jerry sends Sam, Clover and Alex in to investigate.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Jerry calls the girls to WOOHP to give them an urgent mission. It appears that a longtime nemesis, Kyle Katz, is up to his old tricks again.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: When Clover, Alex and Sam's mothers discover that their daughters are spies, they completely freak out and inform Jerry that they are putting an end to it immediately.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Mandy and her cronies become evil spy-sassins (anti-spy agents) and kidnap the spies' mothers. Their plan? To sequester them in hopes that they can capture the spies when they try to save their mums.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Now with the spies trapped back at The Groove, Mandy turns Sam, Clover and Alex into spy-sassins so that they will destroy one another. Luckily for the girls, Jerry trains their mothers to be spies.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: It's graduation time at Bev High... but just as the ceremony gets under way, the entire graduating class, including Sam, Clover and Alex, mysteriously blacks out!

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Sam, Clover and Alex arrive at Malibu University (or Mali-U for short) - a gorgeous school overlooking the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: As the girls look over the class catalogue for their first semester, they are delighted to find a course called "Espionage 101".

programme.title: Totally Spies
programme.desc: Jerry tells the girls he has a very treacherous mission for them: they are to transport an extremely dangerous criminal to WOOHP's highest security penitentiary.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time. But the arrival of the first Time Blade – a weapon with the power to speed up time – sends the Ninja to the Monastery just in time to rescue their master from certain doom.

programme.title: The Hatching
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated. But with Wu out of action and suffering from the effects of the Time Punch, the Ninja discover a new enemy in their midst: The Vermillion Warriors. And the Ninjas have no idea who controls them...

programme.title: A Time Of Traitors
programme.desc: Kai's investigation of a Vermillion Warrior Helmet leads him to discover that Krux is alive and well in Ninjago, living under an assumed identity. Meanwhile, as the Vermillion Warriors go on a kidnapping spree, Lloyd struggles with his role as master-in-training and Nya does her best to reboot Zane, who was knocked off line in his first battle with the Vermillion.

programme.title: The Mask Of Deception
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers. The ninja find themselves scattered to the four corners of the kingdom. Cole and Jay are searching in vain for some sign of Master Wu. Nya fights injustice in the north, while Kai and Zane attempt to fend off an angry lava beast in the west. This leaves Lloyd alone in Ninjago City. He rushes to the scene of a heist at Borg Tower and finds himself up against a team of highly trained operatives led by the mysterious masked MISTER-E. Lloyd fails to prevent the heist and an ancient artifact, the MASK OF DECEPTION, is stolen. Lloyd apprehends one of the criminals but the others escape. Dismayed by his failure, Lloyd calls the ninjas back to Ninjago. The friends are reunited and hope for a little rest and relaxation. These hopes are dashed with the arrival MASTER HUTCHINS, a servant of the Royal Family of Ninjago, who has been sent by the EMPEROR to request their help. A new criminal gang, SONS OF GARMADON (SOG), is attempting to acquire three ancient masks called the ONI MASKS, which are rumored to possess supernatural powers.

programme.title: The Gray Knight
programme.desc: Using his Stone to Life magic the Cloud of Monstrox turns Clay into a living, fighting, breathing stone fighting knight. But will Clay use his forces to fight for good or for evil? Does he have a choice? The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro are able to unlock the forbidden Power Shocking Scare and unleash an attack on the village of Bravington. Knights in their new vehicles rush to the rescue and are able to defeat him with a new Combo Power. In the heat of the battle, the Cloud of Monstrox sees the stone statue of Clay and zaps him to life! Clay is now turned, and is fighting against his friends. It is impossible for them to defeat him without destroying him for good. The Cloud urges Clay on. He attacks the Fortrex in order to get to Merlok. Robin in his Black Knight Mech is trying to stop him, but to no avail. Merlok 2.0 is left undefended. At the very last moment Merlok 2.0 unleashes a blasting spell that sends Clay far far away.

programme.title: The Good, The Bad And The Tightwad
programme.desc: Clay wakes up in the poor town of Nothing Hill which literally have nothing. Will Clay remember who he is and what he is fighting for. His friends try to help him, but Jorah Tightwad and his Bots get in the way. Clay as the Gray Knight wakes up far away in a place called Nothing Hill. A poor town where they literally have nothing. They harvest dust. Jorah Tightwad though has found that there is gold underneath the town. He convinces the confused Clay to help him put pressure on the poor townsfolk to give up their lots. This is an easy job for the strong Gray Knight. The NEXO KNIGHTS finally track him down and tries to convince him about who he is. But to the Gray Knight they are still his enemies, and a giant battle ensues in order to subdue the Gray Knight. At last, only Macy is left. When she begins to recite the Knights Code, some words and their meaning are able to get through the stone hard shell of the Gray Knight and the Evil that clouded him seems to disappear. Together they are able to return the ownership of the town to the villagers.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Chased Dreamers
programme.desc: To craft their own hourglasses and become official Dream Chasers for the Night Bureau, Mateo and his friends must defeat the Dream Forge guardian.

programme.title: The Dream Forge
programme.desc: As time runs out to face the Dream Forge and become official Dream Chasers, Mateo and his friends enlist the help of the mysterious Dream Bandit.

programme.title: Legendary Places, Ninjago's Most Wanted
programme.desc: Cole joins Jay and Zane inside the Nindroid to solve a mysterious puzzle and also Kai enters Zane's mind and suggests the Ninja take a break from puzzle-solving to figure out which villain is trying to hack their friend.

programme.title: The Jade Princess
programme.desc: In the wake of an assassination attempt targeting the royal family, the ninja invite the royal princess, HARUMI, into their makeshift family. Lloyd glimpses someone escaping over the rooftops with a sack on their back. Fearing it is the kidnapped princess, Lloyd takes up the chase! He discovers to his surprise, however, that the masked intruder is none other than the princess herself, who is not quite as docile or meek as she pretends. She has a habit of sneaking out of her chambers at night to feed the homeless who surround the Imperial Palace. This revelation only endears her to Lloyd more and Harumi and Lloyd quickly strike up a friendship. Unfortunately, trouble catches up to the ninja when the Sons Of Garmadon target the second Oni mask and attack the palace. The scope of the attack proves more than the Ninja were prepared for as the Sons of Garmadon detonate a series of subterranean bombs, bringing down part of the palace. Lloyd and Harumi escape onto the flying ship, DESTINY'S BOUNTY. But the victory is a pyrrhic one. The second Oni Mask has been stolen and Harumi's parents and Master Hutchins are feared lost.

programme.title: The Pranks
programme.desc: Stephanie finds the perfect front page story for the school paper! It's almost too good to be true. Emma and Andrea go undercover to solve the mystery of the two Jacobs.The friends are using their talents to pull a prank on Olivia. But who gets the last laugh?

programme.title: Girls on Mission
programme.desc: Emma and Stephanie accidentally rent a scary movie and suddenly there are beasts everywhere... Mia and Stephanie have to use a little horse power at the Sunshine Ranch. Olivia tapes a science show, with a little help from Mia's lemonade stand - and special effects! Stephanie has to face her fears when the class gets an 'Animal Kingdom & 'school assignment.'Andrea relaxes at the beach while Emma is hard at work at her lifeguard tower. Things are getting mixed up on Andrea's first day on the job at Heartlake City Juicebar.

programme.title: The Hands Of Time

programme.title: Transformers

programme.title: Smurfing For Ghosts
programme.desc: Peewit is at the castle of his friends Selwyn and Tallulah when Uncle Fenwick, the friendly ghost, asks for his help in chasing a few relatives who've come to haunt him... Peewit has to get help from the Smurfs, and a merry chase begins...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Grouchy Makes A Splash: We all know Grouchy Smurf hates a lot of things. But one thing he hates more than anything else is water, when there is enough of it to drown in. You see, Grouchy can't swim. And when the Smurfs notice this peculiarity and try to teach him how to survive in water, the evil wizard Gargamel makes things a little more dangerous than they ought to be....

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - No Smurf Is An Island: Handy Smurf is the one who fixes everything that needs mending in the Village of the Smurfs. But are his efforts really appreciated by the other Smurfs? Not at all. At least this is what Handy feels when he resolves to leave the Smurfs Village forever and live in the sea with Marina the Mermaid...

programme.title: The Answer Smurf
programme.desc: Nobody ever listens to Brainy Smurf's advice, and when Papa Smurf is away and Brainy feels he's in charge, he decides he's going to be the one with all the answers. There is a magic formula in Papa Smurf's Book of Spells that ensures everyone in the Village of the Smurfs is going to ask for Brain's opinion. As if matters weren't difficult enough, here's Gargamel...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Tallest Smurf: Smurfs are three apples high. Smurflings are twenty-five smurfberries high. Except for Slouchy, who only measures twenty-two smurfberries. Apart from Baby Smurf, Slouchy is the shortest Smurf, and the jibes and taunts of the other Smurflings make him wish he were the tallest of the Smurfs... Now it so happens that Gourdy the Genie loves to grant wishes...

programme.title: Smurfette's Gift
programme.desc: Every year, Smurfette snoops around to discover what her birthday presents will be before she receives them. But this year, Sassette has created the Keep-Smurfette's-Presents-a-Surprise-Committee. Nat has discovered a cave where they might be able to hide all the gifts prepared by the Smurfs. But what this cave also hides is a greedy imp who is not only interested in keeping Smurfette's gifts...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Sassette's Tooth: Oh dear! Sassette has lost a tooth. Papa Smurf explains that if she puts her tooth under her pillow, the Mouse Fairy will bring her a present in the morning. But the next morning there is no present under the pillow. The Mouse Fairy has not been. She has been captured in one of Gargamel's Smurf traps. And now the evil wizard is concocting a dreadful plan.

programme.title: Smurfs On Wheels
programme.desc: Every year, all the Smurfs make the long hike to Dreamy Steamy Springs. But this year, only Grandpa Smurf, Papa Smurf and Nat are going to walk there. All the other Smurfs are too busy – and too lazy – to walk. But then Handy comes up with what he calls his Customised Smurfwagon. No need to walk, you just let yourself roll along... Of course, things won't be as simple as all that.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Calling Dr Smurf: As his name implies, Dabbler Smurf is incapable of staying put in any one activity. He goes from one pursuit to another with the greatest of ease and never finishes what he's begun. But suddenly here he is smitten by the love of the medical profession. Dabbler wants to become a doctor and all of the Smurfs, with Papa Smurf in the lead, are going to help him to achieve his wish.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - All The Smurf's A Stage: Poet Smurf's new play is going to be his greatest work ever, and it will feature the most favourite Smurf of all: Smurfette in the leading female role. All the other Smurfs vie for the honour of playing opposite Smurfette. Even Timid Smurf, who is the shy and retiring type, is a candidate for the part. Brainy Smurf, self-appointed manager of the play, does not see it that way...

programme.title: Reckless Smurfs
programme.desc: This time, Gargamel's plan cannot fail. Undeterred by Azrael's derisive cackling, the evil wizard perfects a magic substance called Daredevil Dust, which is going to change all the Smurfs into rash, incautious swashbucklers. Will Papa Smurf fall into Gargamel's trap? Will their enemy catch all the Smurfs? Will this story have a happy ending?

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Most Popular Smurf: Jokey's surprise exploding packages have been changed by a spell. Picture the practical joker's discombobulating when he realises that all the surprises that he hands to unsuspecting Smurfs contain nothing but real gifts! No more ka-boom, no more jokes, no more fun! Plus the unenviable new position of Most Popular Smurf in the Village, surrounded by admirers begging for more presents...

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Three Smurfketeers: In another Smurf theatrical super-production based – very loosely – on Alexandre Dumas' characters, a masterpiece of the stage is created, with a few lines from Romeo and Juliet thrown in.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Smurfs' Christmas: The Smurfs come to the rescue of two children and their grandfather when a mysterious stranger appears and causes their sleigh to crash. Knocking on Gargamel's door for help puts them and the Smurfs in danger…

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - A Clockwork Smurf: Handy has built a very complex Smurf machine that does everything. It proves dangerous when it nearly destroys the village, but comes in useful when, with the help of the other Smurfs, it saves the young prince Gerard's kingdom from the queen aunt Imperia's dastardly intentions.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fountain Of Smurf: The Smurfs discover a fountain of youth that is guarded by a wicked troll, who steals Papa Smurf's magic book. They convince Gargamel to help them and the greedy villain runs to get the water, but manages to fall in with the troll. As the two chase each other all over the countryside, the Smurfs are able to retrieve Papa Smurf's book.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Littlest Giant: Simon is lost in the forest and in search of his parents. Simon is the son of a couple of giants. The Smurfs try to bring him home, but then Gargamel interrupts the party.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Once In A Blue Moon: Once in a blue moon, as the legend goes, a baby Smurf is delivered to the Smurfs and everyone in the village becomes attached to the new arrival. But a mistake has been made and the stork returns to take the baby back. Grouchy and Smurfette have become so attached to the baby that the baby is returned.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - Supersmurf: Bigmouth steals the Smurfs' winter food supply and Brainy concocts one of Papa Smurf's magic strength potions so he can fight the greedy giant. The super formula wears off, but Papa Smurf works a fast switch, replacing the food with rocks and Bigmouth is none the wiser.

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: The Smurfs - The Fake Smurf: Hogatha turns herself into a Smurf, plotting revenge on the little people for destroying her magic locket. Papa Smurf outwits her and banishes her from the forest once more.

programme.title: The Baby Smurf
programme.desc: Gargamel turns himself into a Baby Smurf, to be adopted by the Smurfette. He causes complete chaos in the Smurf Village when he tries to blow it up with a time bomb! Papa Smurf discovers his evil plot and uses the explosive to send the wizard back to his dismal castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids in Santa's country.
programme.desc: When Gina & John get out of power in their polar station, they create a new way to produce electricity.

programme.title: Rabbids at your service!
programme.desc: A rabbid gets ejected from his rocket as it crashes, and takes the place of a guide dog.

programme.title: The Rabbids are missing!
programme.desc: When a pilot rabbid disappears, a detective rabbid starts to investigate…

programme.title: Rabbid Obsession.
programme.desc: The rabbids have decided to reach the moon... thanks to a big ladder.

programme.title: The Rabbids make movies
programme.desc: Hibernation Rabbid decides to shoot a film singing his own praises.

programme.title: The Rabbids are misunderstood artists.
programme.desc: By accident, the rabbids destroy the teleporta-TV.

programme.title: The Rabbids are part of the family.
programme.desc: Three particularly stupid rabbids get banned from the rabbid headquaters and wander about the suburbs.

programme.title: The Rabbids are making a mess!
programme.desc: After discovering the joys of tennis, the Rabbids move the game onto an airport runway.

programme.title: Rabbids robbery.
programme.desc: The Rabbids follow a burglary.

programme.title: The Rabbids are lost
programme.desc: A rabbid who got talent after having inhaled the air from a balloon, is suddenly destined to become a star!

programme.title: Welcome to the Rabbids!
programme.desc: A solitary rabbid who has no friend to fly with him to the Moon goes out on a search for one.

programme.title: The Rabbids travel.
programme.desc: The rabbids have collected several pieces of armor from the knights' castle.

programme.title: The Rabbids are locked up!
programme.desc: The Rabbids are shut inside a supermarket after closing hours.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Athena gets Gnasher envy when seeing a pampered version of Gnasher in a magazine and when she hears that Dennis owns an Abyssinian wire-haired tripe hound (Gnasher), she wants him. However, being an owner to Gnasher isn't all cracked up to be! Followed by 'Splash'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis gets a case of the hiccups from Mr. Har Har's can-o-giggles and is looking for a way to cure them ready for a film premier. Followed by Athena's Party

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: The garden is accidentaly wrecked when Dennis tries to give Gnasher a bath, so the gang have to fix the mess before Mum comes home. Followed by 'Run Rabbit Run'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis makes a line of practical jokes for Mr. Scrimp, called 'The Menace Collection.' However, Dennis soon learns that it will put Mr. Har Har out of business.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Walter takes up origami as a martial art, Dennis scoffs and comes up with his own martial art, and so the two prepare to battle it out. Followed by 'Smelling of Roses'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After watching a film about an alien invasion, Dennis, Curly and Pie Face decide to make their own film. However, Walter stumbles across them filming, and he only sees the action, not the camera. Filming what he sees on his mobile phone, he runs to tell the whole of Beanotown about the alien invasion. As panic spreads, Dennis and his friends discover the chaos and decide to keep filming in order to help make the best of their own alien film. Meanwhile, Sergeant Slipper investigates the alien landing that Walter has seen, and discovers the truth—that the spaceship is a playhouse with glow sticks in it. Followed by 'Castle in the Air'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis and his pet dog, Gnasher, live by just one rule: Kids should make all the rules! Followed by Dance of the Seven Pies.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: To get his friends back from Walter's group, Dennis challenges Walter to a videogames battle. Followed by 'Fish Tale'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: For a school project, Dennis and Walter both build robots. However, during an accident, both robots merge, causing Dennis and Walter to defend the school. Followed by 'No Joke.'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: With one backstage pass for a Ratbucket gig, Dennis and his friends pass themselves off as Ratbucket, only for the real Ratbucket not to be able to play at his own concert. Followed by 60 second Dennis and 'Bad Dad'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: After Dennis breaks his bike, Dad is unable to afford a new one, so Dennis convinces him to ask his boss for a raise. Unfortunately, Mr Scrimp reduces his wages instead. Dennis then trashes his house to convince Scrimp that his family are poor, so that Mr Scrimp will feel compelled to raise Dad's wages. Just as Scrimp has been taken in by Dennis' plan, Mum and Dad arrive home laden with shopping bags, resulting in Dad getting fired on the spot. Dennis resolves to get Dad his old job back by secretly causing chaos at his office. To restore order Scrimp rehires Dad, sealing the deal with a generous pay rise. Mum and Dad repair the house, but still don't have enough money to buy Dennis a new bike, instead it gets repaired with Dad's office rubber bands and paperclips. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dennis Hiccups'.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Believing Gnasher and Gnipper to be trapped in Beanotown Dog Pound, Dennis comes up with a plan to rescue his friends and bring them both home. Followed by more Dennis and Gnasher episodes.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: When Dennis breaks his skateboard again, Dad agrees to buy Dennis the best skateboard there is as a replacement if he is able to win a prize at the upcoming school award ceremony. Followed by 60 Second Dennis and 'Dance of the Seven Pies'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Mum has bought curtain material for the soon to be newly decorated kitchen, and asks Dad to look after it while she is out. However, Dad falls asleep and mistakenly agrees that Dennis can use it as a giant sail. When Dad realises that it has gone, he calls Dennis to bring it back, but unfortunately Dennis gets into a spot of bother with the colonel, who takes the curtain material off Dennis. In an attempt to steal it back, the garden being wrecked and the kitchen is left looking like a bombsite. Dennis, Gnasher and Dad have to clean up the whole kitchen and redecorate it in time for Mum returning. When Mum decides it is time to hang the new curtains, Dennis is about to get the curtain material, but Mum reveals that she has changed her mind and bought new curtains instead. Followed by 'Fangs for the Memories'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis, his friends and Walter's friends get marooned on a desert island when Dennis attempts to escape a boring field trip. Followed by Substitute Creecher

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Dennis plays a prank on the citizens of Beanotown, causing them to evacuate, which causes trouble for Dennis later. Followed by 'No Place Like Home'

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher
programme.desc: Gnasher and Gnipper enter a dog show, regardless of Walter saying they don't have true talent. He wants Athena and Miss Mini Wuff to win, but Walter has just underestimated Gnasher's true capabilities. Followed by Grounded.

programme.desc: A homecoming is interrupted for Sonic, Sonia and Manic when Sleet and Dingo arrive to collect back taxes after returning to their birthplace.

programme.title: Scout Bean

programme.title: Back To School
programme.desc: When there's no milk for his tea and for Teddy, Mr. Bean goes to buy some.

programme.title: Lord Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is in the library to draw the family tree of kings.

programme.title: Car Wars
programme.desc: The mystery driver of the Reliant Supervan becomes obsessed with revenge.

programme.title: Wedding Day
programme.desc: A wedding car crashes, resulting in Bean coming to the rescue and offering the bride a lift.

programme.title: Bean Phone
programme.desc: Mr. Bean wants a smartphone but does not have enough money to buy one.

programme.title: Hotel Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean has some unexpected guests who think he runs a hotel!

programme.title: Jurassic Bean
programme.desc: While Mr. Bean is taking photos of wildlife, he sees big footprints belonging to a dinosaur.

programme.title: Caring Bean

programme.title: Opera Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean's car has broken down and he is late meeting Irma at the opera.

programme.title: Taxi Bean
programme.desc: When one of the toy cars of his racing track set becomes broken, Mr. Bean decides to buy a new one.

programme.title: Muscle Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean needs to impress Irma, who is infatuated with the hunky deliveryman.

programme.title: A New Friend
programme.desc: A small bird wants to befriend Mr. Bean, but its squawking sound annoys Mrs. Wicket.

programme.title: The Lift
programme.desc: Mr. Bean goes on a lift to the top floor of a toy shop, but Teddy gets stuck in the doors and jams the lift.

programme.title: Dig This
programme.desc: It is a nice sunny day and Mr. Bean and Mrs. Wicket are relaxing in the garden.

programme.title: Bean Hypnotised
programme.desc: Mr. Bean attends a hypnotism show where he unwittingly volunteers to be hypnotized.

programme.title: Car Wash
programme.desc: After a stubborn bird deliberately defecates his Mini, Mr. Bean washes it.

programme.title: Where Did You Get That Cat?
programme.desc: Mrs. Wicket has a new hat that looks like Scrapper.

programme.title: Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Two burglars hatch up an evil plan in which one of them disguises himself as a gentleman.

programme.title: Halloween
programme.desc: On Halloween night, Mr. Bean prepares to give the children some tricks and treats they won't forget.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean paints a picture of Teddy, but accidentally splashes some green paint on the wall.
