programme.title: Rare Bird
programme.desc: Mr. Bean loves bird spotting and is desperate to tick off the last elusive bird in his book.

programme.title: Bean's Safari
programme.desc: Mr. Bean visits a safari park where he catches the attention of a baby monkey.

programme.title: A Round of Golf
programme.desc: Mr. Bean fancies a game of golf.

programme.title: Superhero Bean
programme.desc: Mr. Bean becomes a superhero in an attempt to stop a cunning thief.

programme.title: What A Load Of Rubbish
programme.desc: Mr. Bean is a bit too enthusiastic while cleaning his flat and Teddy ends up on his way to the dump.

programme.title: Postman Pat: The Movie
programme.desc: Postman Pat, a mail carrier, lives an idyllic life in the quaint British town of Greendale. When a national talent TV show comes to town, Pat enters. But when he comes face-to-face with the temptations of money – can he resist?

programme.title: Rabbit Academy
programme.desc: Peter Rabbit meets Monsters University in the exciting, animated feature Rabbit Academy. This vibrant and colourful family adventure follows Max, the first city rabbit to be chosen in the master class for Easter Rabbits.

programme.title: Aliens Abducted My Parents and Now I Feel Kinda Left Out
programme.desc: Itsy (Emma Tremblay) is the new girl in a small town, with dreams of returning to the big city to pursue her dream career as a journalist.

programme.title: Team Hot Wheels: Origin of Awesome
programme.desc: Meet Gage, Wyatt, Brandon and Rhett. Kids born to ride. Separately, they are seriously skilled racers, but together they become TEAM HOT WHEELS!

programme.title: Adventure Mouse
programme.desc: Dreaming of adventure, city mouse Gamba joins a crew of Ship Mice ready to set sail - just as young Chuta bursts in, pleading for help. Stowing away on a boat, the gang heads for Dream Island to defend Chuta's family of mice against Noroi the White Weasel and his wicked weasel clan.

programme.title: Gray Matters
programme.desc: They finish each other's sentences, dance like Fred and Ginger, and share the same downtown loft – the perfect couple? Not exactly. Gray and Sam, are a sister and brother so compatible and inseparable that people actually assume they are dating.

programme.title: Epic Movie
programme.desc: Two of the warped writers of Scary Movie now set their parodic sights on the largest genre of them all: Hollywood's big-budget, special effects-laden, blockbuster franchise films.

programme.title: Crash Pad
programme.desc: A hopeless romantic (Domhnall Gleeson) thinks he's found true love with an older woman (Christina Applegate) only to learn that she's married and their encounter was merely an instrument of revenge against her neglectful husband (Thomas Haden Church). Initially out for blood...

programme.title: I Want You Back
programme.desc: Peter and Emma thought they were on the precipice of life's biggest moments – marriage, kids, and houses in the suburbs – until their respective partners dumped them.

programme.title: Super Collider
programme.desc: The world's largest particle collider malfunctions and opens a portal to a nightmare dimension.

programme.title: Jet Stream
programme.desc: A TV weatherman tries to find a way to stop devastating winds from ravaging the Earth. Starring David Chokachi, Ruth Kearney and Steven Hartley (2013).

programme.title: Predestination
programme.desc: (2015) Sci-fi action with Ethan Hawke and Succession's Sarah Snook. A temporal agent who stops crimes before they happen is tasked with catching a fugitive who's always one step ahead in time.

programme.title: Asteroid Final Impact
programme.desc: (2015) Action with Mark Lutz. When an asteroid threatens to obliterate Earth, a discredited astrophysicist is humanity's last hope. Armed with cutting-edge tech, can he prevent a global disaster?

programme.title: The Arrival
programme.desc: Radio astronomer Zane Zaminsky (Charlie Sheen) believes he's picked up a cosmic noise that signals extraterrestrial intelligence. His desperate search for answers leads him to Mexico and a mysterious power plant, where is arrested for the murder of a scientist.

programme.title: Bandidas
programme.desc: Two women become bank robbers to help the poor and seek revenge on a ruthless land baron.

programme.title: The One
programme.desc: In a stunning dual role, international action star Jet Li portrays Gabriel Yulaw, a police officer confronted with a sinister form of himself escaped from an advanced, parallel universe and intent onkilling Gabriel.

programme.title: The People We Hate at the Wedding
programme.desc: Dysfunctional American siblings Alice and Paul -- along with their ever-optimistic mom-- are invited to the British wedding of their estranged half-sister, Eloise, as a chance for them to reconnect as – more or less – adults, and learn to love each other like they once did.

programme.title: Pretty Little Stalker
programme.desc: A self help writer and her family become the target of a troubled girl. AKA The Danger of Positive Thinking

programme.title: The Sentinel
programme.desc: Compromised by his affair with the first lady, a veteran secret service agent is framed as a potential presidential assassin and must rely on a hostile former prot‚g‚ to flush out the real culprit.

programme.title: Open Water: Open Water
programme.desc: When a couple is stranded while scuba diving, they soon realize they are in the middle of shark-infested waters in this intense, critically acclaimed thriller.

programme.title: Big Mommas House
programme.desc: In order to protect a woman from a robber, a male FBI agent disguises himself as an elderly woman.

programme.title: Black Knight
programme.desc: When a wisecracking black hustler from South Central L.A. finds himself transported back to medieval England, he leads the overthrow of an evil king and wins the heart of a proto feminist woman.

programme.title: Deepwater Horizon
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg leads an all-star cast in the thrilling story of real-life heroes on a burning oil rig.

programme.title: Patriots Day
programme.desc: Chronicles the courage and power of the people of Boston during the manhunt for the Boston Marathon bombers.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Two hardened criminals get into trouble with the US border patrol after meeting with a Mexican drug lord.

programme.title: The Fighter
programme.desc: A fledgling boxer tries to escape the shadow of his more famous but troubled older boxing brother.

programme.title: G-Loc
programme.desc: In a world on the brink of environmental collapse, mass migration to neighbouring planet, Rhea, is humanity's final hope for survival. The only problem is, in the sixteen Earth years since the first humans landed on Rhea, two hundred and eighty-eight years have passed on the new planet and the existing population are no longer welcoming new arrivals, with the Rheans having set up a space blockade to shot down any ship that tries to cross into their territory. 'Earther', Bran, has big dreams of a better life in this new world, but the odds are stacked against him. Finding himself the lone survivor of a failed emigration attempt, his escape pod floats mindlessly in space and his oxygen is running low. His only chance of survival is to hook up to a rogue Rhean supply ship called The Nysa running on auxiliary power. But after finding the crew on board The Nysa dead, it seems Bran may have more than just a hostile planet to worry about. An intense interstellar thriller with an impressive cast, including Stephen Moyer (True Blood), Casper Van Dien (Starship Troopers) and John Rhys-Davies (the Indiana Jones and Lord of the Rings franchises).

programme.title: Deadly Target
programme.desc: When Special Operative James Webster (Michael Jai White, The Dark Knight, Blood and Bone) returns home from duty to find his brother brutally murdered, his lethal training immediately kicks in. Fuelled by rage and a burning need to avenge his brother, he sets out to hunt down the perpetrators and nothing is going to stand in his way... As he delves deeper to identify the murderers, he finds himself at the centre of a deadly conspiracy and a secret world of corruption one which cuts deep inside the U.S. Government, reaching the very highest levels of command. With a ruthless military assassin (Steve Austin, The Expendables) hot on his trail, Webster must expose the corrupt high-ranking officials before he becomes another victim to the very plot which killed his brother.

programme.title: Landmine Goes Click
programme.desc: Tense thriller starring Spencer Locke, Sterling Knight and Dean Geyer. Three American tourists are backpacking through the remote countryside of European Georgia when one of them gets trapped on an armed landmine. That seems to be a minor threat compared to the nightmarish happenings the rest of the afternoon will bring on however. A psychopath takes advantage of the tourist's immobility and brutally assaults the woman he loves.

programme.title: Last Girl Standing
programme.desc: Five years ago, a masked killer brutally murdered a group of friends. Since then, Camryn (Akasha Villalobos), the lone survivor, has struggled to reclaim her shattered life. Wracked with guilt and paranoia, Camryn leads a depressingly lonely existence until Nick (Brian Villalobos), a new co-worker, befriends Camryn and attempts to integrate her into his group of friends. Just when she might be ready to start a new life, Camryn's past comes back to haunt her. Can Camryn ever have a life again, or is she destined to be alone?

programme.title: Last Looks
programme.desc: Alistair Pinch (Mel Gibson), is an eccentric but successful actor who spends his days drunk living the high-life in Hollywood. When his wife is found dead he becomes the prime suspect in her murder. As Pinch attempts to clear his name he is introduced to Charlie Waldo (Charlie Hunnam) an ex-LAPD big-shot whos left the force. Waldo is convinced to come out of retirement to investigate the case, and finds himself grappling with Hollywood executives, gangsters and nursery teachers, all in pursuit of clearing his name... or confirming his guilt.

programme.title: Ravage
programme.desc: A raw revenge thriller starring Annabelle Dexter-Jones (Succession), Bruce Dern (Nebraska) and Robert Longstreet (Doctor Sleep). Harper, a young nature photographer on assignment captures a disturbing event of a man being brutally beaten in the woods. After reporting the incident to the local sheriff, she is soon captured by the culprits and taken to an abandoned farm in the woods to be tortured.

programme.title: June
programme.desc: Dark. Demonic. Disturbing. Nine-year-old orphan June has been found a new adoptive family. What her new parents do not know is that June is possessed by an ancient dark spirit named Aer. As the evil Aer plans to destroy everything, will June be able to save her new family and herself? In the vein of The Omen and Orphan, this chilling supernatural cult horror is a genre classic and one not to miss.

programme.title: Level 16
programme.desc: A shocking dystopian thriller, mashing together the disturbing world of The Handmaid's Tale and Black Mirror to stunning effect. 16-year old Vivien is trapped in The Vestalis Academy, a prison-like boarding school. Reunited with Sophia who previously betrayed her, they embark on the horrifying truth behind their imprisonment. Soon running for their lives, they must save themselves or die.

programme.title: LOVE AT THE SHORE
programme.desc: Jenna's summer plans for a beach holiday with her kids never included the prospect of finding love.

programme.title: Inspiring Love
programme.desc: After a misunderstanding shy artist Isla and confident salesman Mark team up to create a sculpture for Mark's his boss. As Isla spends more time with Mark, will his confidence rub off? (2022)

programme.title: Love On A Limb
programme.desc: (2016) Charming romance with Ashley Williams. When the mayor hires a landscaper to fell a beloved oak tree, Aimie decides to chain herself to it. As a stand-off ensues, will they fall for each other?

programme.title: Love Takes Flight
programme.desc: Single mum Lizzy has built boundaries at work and personal life to protect herself. After meeting an impulsive pilot, Charlie, at work, will she be open to change and open herself up to love? (2019)

programme.title: Love, Bubbles and Crystal Cove
programme.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Stephanie Bennett. A familiar face arrives to help luxury bath product entrepreneur Skye improve her business model. Can they lather up a real romance, or will their bubble burst?

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop business owners despise each other in real life, but fall in love while unknowingly sending each other messages via a dating app on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Redeeming Love
programme.desc: Sold into prostitution as a child, Angel knows nothing but betrayal. Can her heart ever be mended? Based upon the novel by Francine Rivers.

programme.title: Anything Else
programme.desc: Jerry Falk (Jason Biggs), a young writer in New York City, leaves his girlfriend for free-spirited Amanda (Christina Ricci). Seeking advice, Jerry turns to an older, struggling artist who helps him deal with his messy love life.

programme.title: Straight Up
programme.desc: A gay OCD twentysomething finds his intellectual soul mate in a struggling actress.

programme.title: Christmas Together
programme.desc: A woman leaves New York for LA after a break-up and falls in love while renting the guest house of a young father.

programme.title: You Can't Fight Christmas
programme.desc: Interior designer Leslie Major loves all things Christmas. When she meets handsome Edmund James, she quickly learns he thinks the festivities are frivolous and superficial.

programme.title: Mr Morgans Last Love
programme.desc: He's a widower in Paris who speaks no French. She's a dance instructor less than half his age. Can they become a family, or will his estranged adult children halt the friendship?

programme.title: Forever In My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs—back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy
programme.desc: A busy surgeon heads back home to celebrate her father becoming mayor. But after a chance encounter with the town's only doctor-and most eligible bachelor-she witnesses true compassion which might be the prescription this doctor needs.

programme.title: Love's Second Chance
programme.desc: Passionate fashion stylist Rose is in her 30s and living in New York. When she inherits her grandmother's vintage dress shop, she returns to her small hometown to take care of the store and bumps into her high school crush Cole.

programme.title: Runaway Romance
programme.desc: Reality TV star Ann Stanway leaves Hollywood and finds herself in Amish country where she discovers friendship, new love and ultimately herself. In the end, Ann must decide between staying in her newfound reality or returning to her old one.

programme.title: How to Train Your Husband
programme.desc: A marriage counselor attempts to fix her own marriage by focusing on how to change her husband.

programme.title: Hope's Legacy
programme.desc: When her grandmother leaves her the family ranch, a young woman is inspired to enter the world of competitive horse riding. Old flames, self-doubt, and other obstacles stand in her way of success but with the support of her fianceé, family, and neighbors, she learns to grab life by the reins to make her dreams come true.

programme.title: Dying To Be You
programme.desc: When Lily Anderson was in 4th grade, her class was given pen pals.

programme.title: Dying to Belong
programme.desc: A Freshman college student believes there was foul play.

programme.title: Fighting for the Kids
programme.desc: Chilling accounts of children in danger and the people who fought to protect them.

programme.title: Dying For a Crown
programme.desc: Lydia Campbell and her daughter relocate under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Dying To Be You
programme.desc: When Lily Anderson was in 4th grade, her class was given pen pals.

programme.title: The Wrong Patient
programme.desc: Dr. Richards, a successful plastic surgeon, is caught in a narcissistic patient's scary quest for perfection.

programme.title: The Wrong Husband
programme.desc: Melanie discovers her husband is actually his twin, Alex, back to steal his life—and willing to kill for it.

programme.title: Made For You, With Love
programme.desc: A secondhand wedding dress owner helps brides find their dream gowns but fears giving love a second chance.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: An ancient mummified Incan priest is brought back to life after a botched museum heist.

programme.title: Eat Pray Love
programme.desc: At a crossroads in her life, Liz Gilbert (Julia Roberts) travels to Italy, India and Bali to discover meaning and happiness in this inspiring true story, based on the best-selling book.

programme.title: I Spy
programme.desc: A professional boxer (Eddie Murphy) has to help a U.S. government agent recover a missing jet.

programme.title: The Interview
programme.desc: Story revolves around a handsome talk show host and his producer who find themselves in way over their heads when they get involved in a plot to assassinate the prime minister of North Korea.

programme.title: Utah Blaine
programme.desc: Gunslinger Utah Blaine rescues rancher Joe Neal from lynching by vigilante land-grabbers and runs afoul of vigilante leader Russ Nevers' interests.

programme.title: Paid in Blood
programme.desc: Jeff Cameron is Tom Carter and he's a man on a mission to get revenge for his brother Jerry, who was gunned down after pulling his life savings out of the Rio Canyon town bank.

programme.title: The Bounty Killer
programme.desc: A tenderfoot becomes a bounty hunter in the hopes of making a better future for himself and his new love.

programme.title: Buffalo Bill in Tomahawk Territory
programme.desc: Buffalo Bill tries to protect the Indian's land from a gang who want to get the gold buried there.

programme.title: To Hell and Back
programme.desc: Johnny King, a rebellious drifter, sets out to avenge the death of his mentor and friend, Steve, after he has been murdered for his land by the Ward Brothers.

programme.title: It's Great to Be Young!
programme.desc: t's heaven at Angel Hill Grammar School until the arrival of the new headmaster, Mr. Frome, who prohibits sixth formers from their beloved music making.

programme.title: Catch Us If You Can
programme.desc: A free-wheeling, skylarking film about the attempted escape of two youngsters from the fiercely artificial world in which they have become trapped. Steve and his four friends - Lenny, Mike, Rick and Dennis - manage to persuade Dinah, symbol of a nationwide 'Eat Meat' advertising campaign, to escape from the false values of the commercial world.

programme.title: Three Hats for Lisa
programme.desc: A gorgeous continental film star comes to London for the premiere of her latest film and is whisked away by her number one fan, a Cockney docker and his three friends.

programme.title: Baby and the Battleship
programme.desc: Two sailors - Puncher, ex-lightweight boxing champion of the Navy and a simple sort of chap and Knocker, the 'bright' boy of the ship - go ashore when HMS Gillingham puts into Naples.

programme.title: This Sporting Life
programme.desc: Richard Harris gives a great performance as a man who wants to quit his job as a miner.

programme.title: Native
programme.desc: A signal from the other side of the universe is received by a hive-like society. Two scientists, Cane and Eva, are chosen to leave home and journey many light years to find and colonise the distant world that sent this transmission.

programme.title: Johnny Mnemonic
programme.desc: It's the year 2021 and data courier (Keanu Reeves) is in a race against time to deliver a dangerous stash of information in his head to save himself.

programme.title: Nekrotronic
programme.desc: Howard North gets dragged into a global conflict between the Nekromancers, a family of badass demon hunters, and Finnegan - an evil demon who absorbs people's souls to increase her power.

programme.title: Arrowhead
programme.desc: A tech is sprung from prison by a revolutionary leader who promises him an opportunity to save his father from a scheduled execution if he completes a data-stealing mission. But it goes awry, stranding him on a strange alien moon.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: (2002) Thriller starring Emma Samms. An up-and-coming real estate agent is forced into witness protection after overhearing a crucial piece of evidence at the scene of a murder.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: (2001) Thriller starring Patsy Kensit. A talk-show producer is drawn into a murder investigation when she is convinced that her best friend was killed by a man she met online.

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: (1992) Thriller with Kristin Scott Thomas. Elizabeth is determined to unearth the truth behind her beloved sister's gruesome death. Could the man she loved really have played a part?

programme.title: Mary Higgins Clark
programme.desc: (2004) Thriller with Gabrielle Anwar. When investigating a series of mysterious deaths, a detective is drawn into a complex puzzle which may be linked to a shocking case from her past.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: Relic Hunter
programme.desc: Tia Carrere ('Wayne's World') stars as Sydney Fox, a university professor and black belt who globe-trots after lost, stolen and rumored-to-exist artifacts and antiquities.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: When Liang Shan Po Robbed the Poor
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Water Margin
programme.sub-title: A Death for Love, More Deaths from Greed
programme.desc: Nearly a thousand years ago in ancient China, there was a cruel government. 108 renegade will try to change the story.

programme.title: The Man From Toronto
programme.desc: The world's deadliest assassin and New York's biggest screw-up are mistaken for each other.

programme.title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
programme.desc: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under an ex-MMA rising star and then ultimately have to fight each other and the traitor in their midst.

programme.title: Never Back Down: Revolt
programme.desc: When an amateur fighter is unwilling to throw a fight, his sister Anya (Olivia Popica) must travel to Rome and fight for an elite audience to help pay back her brother's debt to crime boss, Julian (James Faulkner).

programme.title: Pistol Whipped
programme.desc: Matt is an elite ex-cop whose life has gone down hill since he was kicked off the Force. After a rough encounter with a mysterious henchman, Matt is brought face to face with his only chance at reclaiming his life and clearing his gambling debt markers. Only after he gets started on his new tasks does he recognize good guy from bad. Meanwhile Matt's love for his only daughter helps him battle one of his greatest enemies, alcoholism.

programme.title: Rebel in the Rye
programme.desc: The story of the life and mind of the legendary author J.D. Salinger and the events that led to the birth of his iconic book The Catcher in the Rye.

programme.title: Stardust
programme.desc: Chronicles the young David Bowie's first visit to the US in 1971 - a trip that inspired the invention of his iconic alter ego, Ziggy Stardust.

programme.title: Escobar
programme.desc: Escobar chronicles the rise and fall of the worlds most feared drug lord Pablo Escobar and his volatile love affair with Colombia's most famous journalist Virginia Vallejo throughout a reign of terror that tore a country apart.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: Brothers tells the powerful story of two siblings, thirty-something Captain Sam Cahill and younger brother Tommy Cahill, who are polar opposites.

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: It's a race for survival in the criminal underworld of New York in the action-packed thriller TRACERS.

programme.title: Armour of God
programme.desc: Asian Hawk (Jackie Chan) and his bumbling sidekick are sent on a quest through Europe to find a mysterious treasure held by a shadowy organisation of monks. Presented here in a Brand New Restoration.

programme.title: Miracles: The Canton Godfather
programme.desc: A country boy becomes the head of a gang through the purchase of some lucky roses from an old lady. He and a singer at the gang's nightclub try to do a good deed for the old lady when her daughter comes to visit.

programme.title: The Negotiator
programme.desc: In a desperate attempt to prove his innocence, a skilled police negotiator accused of corruption and murder takes hostages in a government office to gain the time he needs to find the truth.
